creator: koen@chillheid.nl
text:
Created attachment 184156
shell archive of the resh directory in the ports tree

This is a port of resh, a restricted shell that only allowes execution of previously defined command aliases.

The port passes portlint, and I've tested it on amd64, but not on other architectures. Since resh is written in Rust, I suspect the supported architectures will be the same as the architectures supported by Rust.

Github page: https://github.com/koenw/resh

This is my first ports submission, so any feedback is more than welcome!
